allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Force "FrontEnd","docs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName, Mode | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "---FrontEnd tree \(depth 2\)---"; if \(Test-Path FrontEnd\) { Get-ChildItem FrontEnd -Recurse -Depth 2 -Force | Where-Object { $_.Name -notmatch '^\(node_modules|\\.angular|dist|\\.git\)$' } | Select-Object FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize })
